summary: Essentials Upsell During Checkout feature fully verified. All 7 test scenarios passed - modal appears on first checkout, shows correct content (header, 3 products, buttons), 'No Thanks' closes modal and proceeds, localStorage flag is set correctly, and modal does NOT appear on subsequent checkouts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Essentials Upsell Modal feature tested and working. Modal component at /app/frontend/src/components/EssentialsUpsellModal.js. Integration logic in ISOPage.js lines 408-456 (maybeShowUpsell, proceedToCheckout, handleBuyNow). localStorage key: 'honeygroove_essentials_prompt_seen'.

playwright_tests.test_1_upsell_modal_appears_first_checko: PASS - Modal with data-testid='essentials-upsell-modal' appears when clicking Buy Now with cleared localStorage
playwright_tests.test_3_three_products_displayed: PASS - All 3 products found: upsell-item-shield, upsell-item-vault, upsell-item-polish
playwright_tests.test_4_no_thanks_button: PASS - 'No Thanks' button (data-testid='upsell-no-thanks') present and functional
playwright_tests.test_5_yes_show_me_button: PASS - 'Yes, Show Me' button (data-testid='upsell-yes') with external link icon present
playwright_tests.test_6_no_thanks_closes_proceeds: PASS - Clicking 'No Thanks' closes modal and proceeds to checkout (Stripe API called)
playwright_tests.test_7_modal_not_shown_second_time: PASS - After dismissal, clicking Buy Now again does NOT show upsell modal
playwright_tests.test_8_localStorage_flag_set: PASS - localStorage flag 'honeygroove_essentials_prompt_seen' set to 'true' after first dismissal
playwright_tests.test_9_flag_preset_no_modal: PASS - When localStorage flag is already set, upsell modal does NOT appear

modal_content: Header: 'Protect Your Investment' with ShieldCheck icon
Product 1: The Shield - Outer Sleeves (4mil Clarity)
Product 2: The Vault - Inner Sleeves (Antistatic Rice Paper)
Product 3: The Polish - Complete Cleaning Kit
Footer text: 'Sleeves and cleaning tools can extend the life of your collection.'

button_behavior.no_thanks: Calls onProceed() which closes modal and continues checkout flow
button_behavior.yes_show_me: Opens /essentials in new tab, then calls onProceed() to continue checkout

verification_notes.stripe_error_expected: Test listings show Stripe checkout error (No such destination) which is expected since test sellers may not have valid Stripe accounts
